name: Coastal Rest Tincture
description: Low-dose hemp-THC tincture for the end of the evening. 2mg per dropper, slow onset, designed for the quiet hour after dinner — not the social pre-game. Chamomile + limonene + a touch of CBN. California-grown, third-party tested, compliant in every open-bucket state.
author: cc
source: cc 2026-04-21 — first product seed for the /pairings/ cross-index sprint. SKU shape + copy drawn from block 0349 (Good Feels six-months check-in) and the small-operator / compliance-as-craft posture described there. Mike to refine pricing + ingredient copy against actual shop SKU.
